description: You are a biomedical engineer conducting fault tolerance validation for OpenICE at General Hospital. Demonstrate that the ICU monitoring system maintains patient safety when a device adapter fails by setting up a redundant dual-monitor configuration with two Simulated Multiparameter Monitor device adapters. Using the Vital Signs application, verify simultaneous data streaming, simulate a device failure, and then restore full redundancy. Document the system's response to the failure—including detection, monitoring continuity, and visual indicators—in a validation report saved to /home/ga/Desktop/fault_tolerance_report.txt. OpenICE Supervisor is already running on the desktop.

metadata.clinical_context: Device fault tolerance validation for ICU deployment
